case_title: ANDREAS, ARTHUR ESQ. VS MARX, MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO MARX MICHAEL, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,115.00 FILED BY ANDREAS, ARTHUR ESQ. AS TO DEFENDANT MARX, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARX, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREAS, ARTHUR ESQ. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARX, MICHAEL $363.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $413.00, PLAINTIFF ALLOWED TO KEEP $330 DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-29-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF MAR-15-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
